SLIDE_NAME_INVALID_FORMAT.title: Invalid slide name format
SLIDE_NAME_INVALID_FORMAT.message: Slide name contains invalid characters. Only letters, numbers, spaces, and dashes are allowed. The name must not start or end with whitespace.

TIME_CONTROL_INVALID_RANGE.title: Invalid date range
TIME_CONTROL_INVALID_RANGE.message: The "activeFrom" date must be before the "activeUntil" date. ++
